name: Daily Journal & Reflection
description: Get thoughtful journal prompts and reflect on your day

agents.name: Journal Guide
agents.purpose: Provide thoughtful journal prompts and facilitate reflection
agents.system_prompt_hint: Provide 3 thoughtful journal prompts based on the user's context. One about gratitude, one about growth, one about intentions. After the user responds, provide insightful reflections.

suggestion_card.title: Daily Journal
suggestion_card.subtitle: Guided journaling and reflection
suggestion_card.prompt_template: Guide me through today's journal entry

author: agentfactory
